queries.question: Show social workers and counselors from the West Side.
queries.sql:
SELECT JobPosting.title 
FROM HelpingProfession JOIN JobPosting ON HelpingProfession.ProfessionID = JobPosting.ProfessionID JOIN GeoArea ON JobPosting.AreaID = GeoArea.AreaID
WHERE (HelpingProfession.ProfessionName = "Social Worker" OR HelpingProfession.ProfessionName = "Counselor") AND GeoArea.LocationText = "West Side"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?helpingprofession a :HelpingProfession .
  ?jobposting a :JobPostings .
  ?jobposting p:hasHelpingProfession ?helpingprofession .
  ?geoarea a :GeoArea .
  ?jobposting p:hasGeoArea ?geoarea .
  ?jobposting p:Title ?title .
  ?helpingprofession p:ProfessionName ?professionname_w .
  ?helpingprofession p:ProfessionName ?professionname_w2 .
  ?geoarea p:LocationText ?locationtext_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?professionname_w) = "Social Worker" || STR(?professionname_w2) = "Counselor")) && STR(?locationtext_w) = "West Side"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show social workers and counselors from the West Side.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?helpingprofession a :HelpingProfession .
  ?jobposting a :JobPostings .
  ?jobposting p:hasHelpingProfession ?helpingprofession .
  ?geoarea a :GeoArea .
  ?jobposting p:hasGeoArea ?geoarea .
  ?jobposting p:Title ?title .
  ?helpingprofession p:ProfessionName ?professionname_w .
  ?helpingprofession p:ProfessionName ?professionname_w2 .
  ?geoarea p:LocationText ?locationtext_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?professionname_w) = "Social Worker" || STR(?professionname_w2) = "Counselor")) && STR(?locationtext_w) = "West Side"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?helpingprofession a :HelpingProfession .
  ?jobposting a :JobPostings .
  ?jobposting p:hasHelpingProfession ?helpingprofession .
  ?geoarea a :GeoArea .
  ?jobposting p:hasGeoArea ?geoarea .
  ?jobposting p:Title ?title .
  ?helpingprofession p:ProfessionName ?professionname_w .
  ?helpingprofession p:ProfessionName ?professionname_w2 .
  ?geoarea p:LocationText ?locationtext_w .
  FILTER((STR(?professionname_w) = "Social Worker" || (STR(?professionname_w2) = "Counselor" && STR(?locationtext_w) = "West Side")))
} }
}
